                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>False</code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>stealthy_headers</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>If enabled (default), it creates and adds real browser headers. It also sets a Google referer header.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><span title="scrapling.core._types.Optional">Optional</span>[<a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool">bool</a>]</code>
                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>True</code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>proxies</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Dict of proxies to use. Format: {"http": proxy_url, "https": proxy_url}.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><span title="scrapling.core._types.Optional">Optional</span>[<span title="scrapling.core._types.Dict">Dict</span>[<a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str">str</a>, <a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str">str</a>]]</code>
                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>None</code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>proxy</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Proxy URL to use. Format: "http://username:password@localhost:8030".
Cannot be used together with the <code>proxies</code> parameter.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><span title="scrapling.core._types.Optional">Optional</span>[<a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str">str</a>]</code>
                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>None</code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>

            <td>
                <code>proxy_auth</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>HTTP basic auth for proxy, tuple of (username, password).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>

                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>None</code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>

            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Number of seconds to wait before timing out.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><span title="scrapling.core._types.Optional">Optional</span>[<a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int">int</a> | <a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float">float</a>]</code>
                  </span>
                  <span class="doc-param-default">
                    <b>DEFAULT:</b>
                      <code>30</code>
                  </span>
              </p>

          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>headers</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Headers to include in the session with every request.</p>

            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">

            <td class="doc-param-details">

                <p>Whether to follow redirects. Defaults to "safe", which follows redirects but rejects those targeting internal/private IPs (SSRF protection). Pass True to follow all redirects without restriction.</p>

</span><span id="__span-0-680"><a id="__codelineno-0-680" name="__codelineno-0-680"></a><span class="sd">    :param http3: Whether to use HTTP3. Defaults to False. It might be problematic if used it with `impersonate`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-681"><a id="__codelineno-0-681" name="__codelineno-0-681"></a><span class="sd">    :param stealthy_headers: If enabled (default), it creates and adds real browser headers. It also sets a Google referer header.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-682"><a id="__codelineno-0-682" name="__codelineno-0-682"></a><span class="sd">    :param proxies: Dict of proxies to use. Format: {"http": proxy_url, "https": proxy_url}.</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-686"><a id="__codelineno-0-686" name="__codelineno-0-686"></a><span class="sd">    :param timeout: Number of seconds to wait before timing out.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-687"><a id="__codelineno-0-687" name="__codelineno-0-687"></a><span class="sd">    :param headers: Headers to include in the session with every request.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-688"><a id="__codelineno-0-688" name="__codelineno-0-688"></a><span class="sd">    :param retries: Number of retry attempts. Defaults to 3.</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-690"><a id="__codelineno-0-690" name="__codelineno-0-690"></a><span class="sd">    :param follow_redirects: Whether to follow redirects. Defaults to "safe", which follows redirects but rejects those targeting internal/private IPs (SSRF protection). Pass True to follow all redirects without restriction.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-691"><a id="__codelineno-0-691" name="__codelineno-0-691"></a><span class="sd">    :param max_redirects: Maximum number of redirects. Default 30, use -1 for unlimited.</span>

        <p>A Stealthy Browser session manager with page pooling.</p>

        <p>A Browser session manager with page pooling, it's using a persistent browser Context by default with a temporary user profile directory.</p>


<div class="md-typeset__scrollwrap"><div class="md-typeset__table"><table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th><span class="doc-section-title">PARAMETER</span></th>
          <th><span>DESCRIPTION</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>headless</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Run the browser in headless/hidden (default), or headful/visible mode.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>disable_resources</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.
Requests dropped are of type <code>font</code>, <code>image</code>, <code>media</code>, <code>beacon</code>, <code>object</code>, <code>imageset</code>, <code>texttrack</code>, <code>websocket</code>, <code>csp_report</code>, and <code>stylesheet</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>blocked_domains</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., <code>"example.com"</code> blocks <code>"sub.example.com"</code> too).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>useragent</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Pass a useragent string to be used. Otherwise the fetcher will generate a real Useragent of the same browser and use it.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>cookies</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Set cookies for the next request.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>network_idle</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">

              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">

                <p>The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the <code>Response</code> object.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_action</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Added for automation. A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_setup</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>init_script</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>An absolute path to a JavaScript file to be executed on page creation for all pages in this session.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>locale</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Specify user locale, for example, <code>en-GB</code>, <code>de-DE</code>, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting
rules. Defaults to the system default locale.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timezone_id</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">

              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector_state</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">

              <p>
              </p>

          </tr>

            <td>
                <code>solve_cloudflare</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">

              <p>

          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>real_chrome</code>

            <td class="doc-param-details">

            <td>
                <code>hide_canvas</code>

          </tr>

            <td class="doc-param-details">

          <tr class="doc-section-item">

</span><span id="__span-0-54"><a id="__codelineno-0-54" name="__codelineno-0-54"></a><span class="sd">    :param locale: Specify user locale, for example, `en-GB`, `de-DE`, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting</span>

<h3 id="scrapling.fetchers.StealthySession.fetch" class="doc doc-heading">
<code class="doc-symbol doc-symbol-heading doc-symbol-method"></code>            <span class="doc doc-object-name doc-function-name">fetch</span>


<a href="https://scrapling.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api-reference/fetchers.html#scrapling.fetchers.StealthySession.fetch" class="headerlink" title="Permanent link">¶</a></h3>
<div class="language-python doc-signature highlight"><pre id="__code_121"><span></span><nav class="md-code__nav"><button class="md-code__button" title="Copy to clipboard" data-clipboard-target="#__code_121 > code" data-md-type="copy"></button></nav><code class="md-code__content"><span id="__span-0-1"><a id="__codelineno-0-1" name="__codelineno-0-1" href="https://scrapling.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api-reference/fetchers.html#__codelineno-0-1"></a><span class="nf">fetch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">**</span><span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></code></pre></div>

    <div class="doc doc-contents ">

        <p>Opens up the browser and do your request based on your chosen options.</p>


<div class="md-typeset__scrollwrap"><div class="md-typeset__table"><table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th><span class="doc-section-title">PARAMETER</span></th>
          <th><span>DESCRIPTION</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>url</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The Target url.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str">str</a></code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>google_search</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the <code>Response</code> object.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_action</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Added for automation. A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_setup</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>extra_headers</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. <em>The referer set by <code>google_search</code> takes priority over the referer set here if used together.</em></p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>disable_resources</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.
Requests dropped are of type <code>font</code>, <code>image</code>, <code>media</code>, <code>beacon</code>, <code>object</code>, <code>imageset</code>, <code>texttrack</code>, <code>websocket</code>, <code>csp_report</code>, and <code>stylesheet</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>blocked_domains</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., <code>"example.com"</code> blocks <code>"sub.example.com"</code> too).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector_state</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The state to wait for the selector given with <code>wait_selector</code>. The default state is <code>attached</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>network_idle</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>load_dom</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>solve_cloudflare</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Solves all types of the Cloudflare's Turnstile/Interstitial challenges before returning the response to you.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>

</span><span id="__span-0-185"><a id="__codelineno-0-185" name="__codelineno-0-185"></a><span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">"""Opens up the browser and do your request based on your chosen options.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-186"><a id="__codelineno-0-186" name="__codelineno-0-186"></a>
</span><span id="__span-0-187"><a id="__codelineno-0-187" name="__codelineno-0-187"></a><span class="sd">    :param url: The Target url.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-188"><a id="__codelineno-0-188" name="__codelineno-0-188"></a><span class="sd">    :param google_search: Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-189"><a id="__codelineno-0-189" name="__codelineno-0-189"></a><span class="sd">    :param timeout: The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-190"><a id="__codelineno-0-190" name="__codelineno-0-190"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait: The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the ` Response ` object.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-191"><a id="__codelineno-0-191" name="__codelineno-0-191"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_action: Added for automation. A function that takes the `page` object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-192"><a id="__codelineno-0-192" name="__codelineno-0-192"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_setup: A function that takes the `page` object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-193"><a id="__codelineno-0-193" name="__codelineno-0-193"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_headers: A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. _The referer set by `google_search` takes priority over the referer set here if used together._</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-194"><a id="__codelineno-0-194" name="__codelineno-0-194"></a><span class="sd">    :param disable_resources: Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-195"><a id="__codelineno-0-195" name="__codelineno-0-195"></a><span class="sd">        Requests dropped are of type `font`, `image`, `media`, `beacon`, `object`, `imageset`, `texttrack`, `websocket`, `csp_report`, and `stylesheet`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-196"><a id="__codelineno-0-196" name="__codelineno-0-196"></a><span class="sd">    :param blocked_domains: A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., ``"example.com"`` blocks ``"sub.example.com"`` too).</span>

        <p>An async Stealthy Browser session manager with page pooling.</p>

        <p>A Browser session manager with page pooling, it's using a persistent browser Context by default with a temporary user profile directory.</p>


<div class="md-typeset__scrollwrap"><div class="md-typeset__table"><table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th><span class="doc-section-title">PARAMETER</span></th>
          <th><span>DESCRIPTION</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>headless</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Run the browser in headless/hidden (default), or headful/visible mode.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>disable_resources</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.
Requests dropped are of type <code>font</code>, <code>image</code>, <code>media</code>, <code>beacon</code>, <code>object</code>, <code>imageset</code>, <code>texttrack</code>, <code>websocket</code>, <code>csp_report</code>, and <code>stylesheet</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>blocked_domains</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., <code>"example.com"</code> blocks <code>"sub.example.com"</code> too).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>useragent</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Pass a useragent string to be used. Otherwise the fetcher will generate a real Useragent of the same browser and use it.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>cookies</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Set cookies for the next request.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>network_idle</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the <code>Response</code> object.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_action</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Added for automation. A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_setup</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>init_script</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>An absolute path to a JavaScript file to be executed on page creation for all pages in this session.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>locale</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Specify user locale, for example, <code>en-GB</code>, <code>de-DE</code>, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting
rules. Defaults to the system default locale.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timezone_id</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Changes the timezone of the browser. Defaults to the system timezone.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector_state</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The state to wait for the selector given with <code>wait_selector</code>. The default state is <code>attached</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>solve_cloudflare</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Solves all types of the Cloudflare's Turnstile/Interstitial challenges before returning the response to you.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>real_chrome</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>If you have a Chrome browser installed on your device, enable this, and the Fetcher will launch an instance of your browser and use it.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>hide_canvas</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Add random noise to canvas operations to prevent fingerprinting.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>block_webrtc</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Forces WebRTC to respect proxy settings to prevent local IP address leak.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>allow_webgl</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default. Disabling it disables WebGL and WebGL 2.0 support entirely. Disabling WebGL is not recommended as many WAFs now check if WebGL is enabled.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>load_dom</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>cdp_url</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Instead of launching a new browser instance, connect to this CDP URL to control real browsers through CDP.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>google_search</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>extra_headers</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. <em>The referer set by <code>google_search</code> takes priority over the referer set here if used together.</em></p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>proxy</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The proxy to be used with requests, it can be a string or a dictionary with the keys 'server', 'username', and 'password' only.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>user_data_dir</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Path to a User Data Directory, which stores browser session data like cookies and local storage. The default is to create a temporary directory.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>extra_flags</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A list of additional browser flags to pass to the browser on launch.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>selector_config</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The arguments that will be passed in the end while creating the final Selector's class.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>additional_args</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Additional arguments to be passed to Playwright's context as additional settings, and it takes higher priority than Scrapling's settings.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table></div></div>

<span class="normal"><a href="https://scrapling.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api-reference/fetchers.html#__codelineno-0-350">350</a></span></pre></div></td><td class="code"><div><pre id="__code_124"><span></span><nav class="md-code__nav"><button class="md-code__button" title="Copy to clipboard" data-clipboard-target="#__code_124 > code" data-md-type="copy"></button></nav><code class="md-code__content" tabindex="0"><span id="__span-0-314"><a id="__codelineno-0-314" name="__codelineno-0-314"></a><span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">**</span><span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Unpack</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">StealthSession</span><span class="p">]):</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-315"><a id="__codelineno-0-315" name="__codelineno-0-315"></a><span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">"""A Browser session manager with page pooling, it's using a persistent browser Context by default with a temporary user profile directory.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-316"><a id="__codelineno-0-316" name="__codelineno-0-316"></a>
</span><span id="__span-0-317"><a id="__codelineno-0-317" name="__codelineno-0-317"></a><span class="sd">    :param headless: Run the browser in headless/hidden (default), or headful/visible mode.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-318"><a id="__codelineno-0-318" name="__codelineno-0-318"></a><span class="sd">    :param disable_resources: Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-319"><a id="__codelineno-0-319" name="__codelineno-0-319"></a><span class="sd">        Requests dropped are of type `font`, `image`, `media`, `beacon`, `object`, `imageset`, `texttrack`, `websocket`, `csp_report`, and `stylesheet`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-320"><a id="__codelineno-0-320" name="__codelineno-0-320"></a><span class="sd">    :param blocked_domains: A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., ``"example.com"`` blocks ``"sub.example.com"`` too).</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-321"><a id="__codelineno-0-321" name="__codelineno-0-321"></a><span class="sd">    :param useragent: Pass a useragent string to be used. Otherwise the fetcher will generate a real Useragent of the same browser and use it.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-322"><a id="__codelineno-0-322" name="__codelineno-0-322"></a><span class="sd">    :param cookies: Set cookies for the next request.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-323"><a id="__codelineno-0-323" name="__codelineno-0-323"></a><span class="sd">    :param network_idle: Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-324"><a id="__codelineno-0-324" name="__codelineno-0-324"></a><span class="sd">    :param timeout: The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-325"><a id="__codelineno-0-325" name="__codelineno-0-325"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait: The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the ` Response ` object.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-326"><a id="__codelineno-0-326" name="__codelineno-0-326"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_action: Added for automation. A function that takes the `page` object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-327"><a id="__codelineno-0-327" name="__codelineno-0-327"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_setup: A function that takes the `page` object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-328"><a id="__codelineno-0-328" name="__codelineno-0-328"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector: Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-329"><a id="__codelineno-0-329" name="__codelineno-0-329"></a><span class="sd">    :param init_script: An absolute path to a JavaScript file to be executed on page creation for all pages in this session.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-330"><a id="__codelineno-0-330" name="__codelineno-0-330"></a><span class="sd">    :param locale: Specify user locale, for example, `en-GB`, `de-DE`, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-331"><a id="__codelineno-0-331" name="__codelineno-0-331"></a><span class="sd">        rules. Defaults to the system default locale.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-332"><a id="__codelineno-0-332" name="__codelineno-0-332"></a><span class="sd">    :param timezone_id: Changes the timezone of the browser. Defaults to the system timezone.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-333"><a id="__codelineno-0-333" name="__codelineno-0-333"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector_state: The state to wait for the selector given with `wait_selector`. The default state is `attached`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-334"><a id="__codelineno-0-334" name="__codelineno-0-334"></a><span class="sd">    :param solve_cloudflare: Solves all types of the Cloudflare's Turnstile/Interstitial challenges before returning the response to you.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-335"><a id="__codelineno-0-335" name="__codelineno-0-335"></a><span class="sd">    :param real_chrome: If you have a Chrome browser installed on your device, enable this, and the Fetcher will launch an instance of your browser and use it.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-336"><a id="__codelineno-0-336" name="__codelineno-0-336"></a><span class="sd">    :param hide_canvas: Add random noise to canvas operations to prevent fingerprinting.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-337"><a id="__codelineno-0-337" name="__codelineno-0-337"></a><span class="sd">    :param block_webrtc: Forces WebRTC to respect proxy settings to prevent local IP address leak.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-338"><a id="__codelineno-0-338" name="__codelineno-0-338"></a><span class="sd">    :param allow_webgl: Enabled by default. Disabling it disables WebGL and WebGL 2.0 support entirely. Disabling WebGL is not recommended as many WAFs now check if WebGL is enabled.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-339"><a id="__codelineno-0-339" name="__codelineno-0-339"></a><span class="sd">    :param load_dom: Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-340"><a id="__codelineno-0-340" name="__codelineno-0-340"></a><span class="sd">    :param cdp_url: Instead of launching a new browser instance, connect to this CDP URL to control real browsers through CDP.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-341"><a id="__codelineno-0-341" name="__codelineno-0-341"></a><span class="sd">    :param google_search: Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-342"><a id="__codelineno-0-342" name="__codelineno-0-342"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_headers: A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. _The referer set by `google_search` takes priority over the referer set here if used together._</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-343"><a id="__codelineno-0-343" name="__codelineno-0-343"></a><span class="sd">    :param proxy: The proxy to be used with requests, it can be a string or a dictionary with the keys 'server', 'username', and 'password' only.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-344"><a id="__codelineno-0-344" name="__codelineno-0-344"></a><span class="sd">    :param user_data_dir: Path to a User Data Directory, which stores browser session data like cookies and local storage. The default is to create a temporary directory.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-345"><a id="__codelineno-0-345" name="__codelineno-0-345"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_flags: A list of additional browser flags to pass to the browser on launch.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-346"><a id="__codelineno-0-346" name="__codelineno-0-346"></a><span class="sd">    :param selector_config: The arguments that will be passed in the end while creating the final Selector's class.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-347"><a id="__codelineno-0-347" name="__codelineno-0-347"></a><span class="sd">    :param additional_args: Additional arguments to be passed to Playwright's context as additional settings, and it takes higher priority than Scrapling's settings.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-348"><a id="__codelineno-0-348" name="__codelineno-0-348"></a><span class="sd">    """</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-349"><a id="__codelineno-0-349" name="__codelineno-0-349"></a>    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__validate__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">**</span><span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-350"><a id="__codelineno-0-350" name="__codelineno-0-350"></a>    <span class="nb">super</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_pages</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">max_pages</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></code></pre></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div>

  </span>

<a href="https://scrapling.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api-reference/fetchers.html#scrapling.fetchers.AsyncStealthySession.fetch" class="headerlink" title="Permanent link">¶</a></h3>
<div class="language-python doc-signature highlight"><pre id="__code_147"><span></span><nav class="md-code__nav"><button class="md-code__button" title="Copy to clipboard" data-clipboard-target="#__code_147 > code" data-md-type="copy"></button></nav><code class="md-code__content"><span id="__span-0-1"><a id="__codelineno-0-1" name="__codelineno-0-1" href="https://scrapling.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api-reference/fetchers.html#__codelineno-0-1"></a><span class="nf">fetch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">**</span><span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></code></pre></div>

    <div class="doc doc-contents ">

        <p>Opens up the browser and do your request based on your chosen options.</p>


<div class="md-typeset__scrollwrap"><div class="md-typeset__table"><table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th><span class="doc-section-title">PARAMETER</span></th>
          <th><span>DESCRIPTION</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>url</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The Target url.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
                  <span class="doc-param-annotation">
                    <b>TYPE:</b>
                      <code><a class="autorefs autorefs-external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str">str</a></code>
                  </span>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>google_search</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the <code>Response</code> object.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_action</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Added for automation. A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_setup</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>extra_headers</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. <em>The referer set by <code>google_search</code> takes priority over the referer set here if used together.</em></p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>disable_resources</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.
Requests dropped are of type <code>font</code>, <code>image</code>, <code>media</code>, <code>beacon</code>, <code>object</code>, <code>imageset</code>, <code>texttrack</code>, <code>websocket</code>, <code>csp_report</code>, and <code>stylesheet</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>blocked_domains</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., <code>"example.com"</code> blocks <code>"sub.example.com"</code> too).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector_state</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The state to wait for the selector given with <code>wait_selector</code>. The default state is <code>attached</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>network_idle</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>load_dom</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>solve_cloudflare</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Solves all types of the Cloudflare's Turnstile/Interstitial challenges before returning the response to you.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>selector_config</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The arguments that will be passed in the end while creating the final Selector's class.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>proxy</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Static proxy to override rotator and session proxy. A new browser context will be created and used with it.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table></div></div>

</span><span id="__span-0-460"><a id="__codelineno-0-460" name="__codelineno-0-460"></a><span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">"""Opens up the browser and do your request based on your chosen options.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-461"><a id="__codelineno-0-461" name="__codelineno-0-461"></a>
</span><span id="__span-0-462"><a id="__codelineno-0-462" name="__codelineno-0-462"></a><span class="sd">    :param url: The Target url.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-463"><a id="__codelineno-0-463" name="__codelineno-0-463"></a><span class="sd">    :param google_search: Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-464"><a id="__codelineno-0-464" name="__codelineno-0-464"></a><span class="sd">    :param timeout: The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-465"><a id="__codelineno-0-465" name="__codelineno-0-465"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait: The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the ` Response ` object.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-466"><a id="__codelineno-0-466" name="__codelineno-0-466"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_action: Added for automation. A function that takes the `page` object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-467"><a id="__codelineno-0-467" name="__codelineno-0-467"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_setup: A function that takes the `page` object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-468"><a id="__codelineno-0-468" name="__codelineno-0-468"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_headers: A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. _The referer set by `google_search` takes priority over the referer set here if used together._</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-469"><a id="__codelineno-0-469" name="__codelineno-0-469"></a><span class="sd">    :param disable_resources: Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-470"><a id="__codelineno-0-470" name="__codelineno-0-470"></a><span class="sd">        Requests dropped are of type `font`, `image`, `media`, `beacon`, `object`, `imageset`, `texttrack`, `websocket`, `csp_report`, and `stylesheet`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-471"><a id="__codelineno-0-471" name="__codelineno-0-471"></a><span class="sd">    :param blocked_domains: A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., ``"example.com"`` blocks ``"sub.example.com"`` too).</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-472"><a id="__codelineno-0-472" name="__codelineno-0-472"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector: Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-473"><a id="__codelineno-0-473" name="__codelineno-0-473"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector_state: The state to wait for the selector given with `wait_selector`. The default state is `attached`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-474"><a id="__codelineno-0-474" name="__codelineno-0-474"></a><span class="sd">    :param network_idle: Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-475"><a id="__codelineno-0-475" name="__codelineno-0-475"></a><span class="sd">    :param load_dom: Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-476"><a id="__codelineno-0-476" name="__codelineno-0-476"></a><span class="sd">    :param solve_cloudflare: Solves all types of the Cloudflare's Turnstile/Interstitial challenges before returning the response to you.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-477"><a id="__codelineno-0-477" name="__codelineno-0-477"></a><span class="sd">    :param selector_config: The arguments that will be passed in the end while creating the final Selector's class.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-478"><a id="__codelineno-0-478" name="__codelineno-0-478"></a><span class="sd">    :param proxy: Static proxy to override rotator and session proxy. A new browser context will be created and used with it.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-479"><a id="__codelineno-0-479" name="__codelineno-0-479"></a><span class="sd">    :return: A `Response` object.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-480"><a id="__codelineno-0-480" name="__codelineno-0-480"></a><span class="sd">    """</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-481"><a id="__codelineno-0-481" name="__codelineno-0-481"></a>    <span class="n">static_proxy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"proxy"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-486"><a id="__codelineno-0-486" name="__codelineno-0-486"></a>        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">RuntimeError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"Context manager has been closed"</span><span class="p">)</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-488"><a id="__codelineno-0-488" name="__codelineno-0-488"></a>    <span class="n">request_headers_keys</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">h</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">h</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">params</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extra_headers</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">keys</span><span class="p">()}</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">params</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extra_headers</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-491"><a id="__codelineno-0-491" name="__codelineno-0-491"></a>    <span class="p">)</span>

</span><span id="__span-0-494"><a id="__codelineno-0-494" name="__codelineno-0-494"></a>        <span class="n">proxy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Optional</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProxyType</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-495"><a id="__codelineno-0-495" name="__codelineno-0-495"></a>        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">proxy_rotator</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">static_proxy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>

              var diagram = document.getElementById('mermaid-diagram-scrapling.fetchers.DynamicSession');
              diagram.innerHTML = diagram.innerHTML.replace(/click ([\w.]+) href "" "\1"/g, function(match, nodeID, offset) {

        <p>A Browser session manager with page pooling.</p>

        <p>A Browser session manager with page pooling, it's using a persistent browser Context by default with a temporary user profile directory.</p>


<div class="md-typeset__scrollwrap"><div class="md-typeset__table"><table>
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th><span class="doc-section-title">PARAMETER</span></th>
          <th><span>DESCRIPTION</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>headless</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Run the browser in headless/hidden (default), or headful/visible mode.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>disable_resources</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.
Requests dropped are of type <code>font</code>, <code>image</code>, <code>media</code>, <code>beacon</code>, <code>object</code>, <code>imageset</code>, <code>texttrack</code>, <code>websocket</code>, <code>csp_report</code>, and <code>stylesheet</code>.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>blocked_domains</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., <code>"example.com"</code> blocks <code>"sub.example.com"</code> too).</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>useragent</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Pass a useragent string to be used. Otherwise the fetcher will generate a real Useragent of the same browser and use it.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>cookies</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Set cookies for the next request.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>network_idle</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timeout</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the <code>Response</code> object.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_action</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Added for automation. A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>page_setup</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>A function that takes the <code>page</code> object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>init_script</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>An absolute path to a JavaScript file to be executed on page creation for all pages in this session.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>locale</code>
            </td>
            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>Specify user locale, for example, <code>en-GB</code>, <code>de-DE</code>, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting
rules. Defaults to the system default locale.</p>
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>timezone_id</code>

            <td class="doc-param-details">

              <p>

          </tr>
          <tr class="doc-section-item">
            <td>
                <code>wait_selector_state</code>

            <td class="doc-param-details">
              <div class="doc-md-description">
                <p>The state to wait for the selector given with <code>wait_selector</code>. The default state is <code>attached</code>.</p>

              <p>

            <td>

</span><span id="__span-0-39"><a id="__codelineno-0-39" name="__codelineno-0-39"></a><span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">"""A Browser session manager with page pooling, it's using a persistent browser Context by default with a temporary user profile directory.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-40"><a id="__codelineno-0-40" name="__codelineno-0-40"></a>
</span><span id="__span-0-41"><a id="__codelineno-0-41" name="__codelineno-0-41"></a><span class="sd">    :param headless: Run the browser in headless/hidden (default), or headful/visible mode.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-42"><a id="__codelineno-0-42" name="__codelineno-0-42"></a><span class="sd">    :param disable_resources: Drop requests for unnecessary resources for a speed boost.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-43"><a id="__codelineno-0-43" name="__codelineno-0-43"></a><span class="sd">        Requests dropped are of type `font`, `image`, `media`, `beacon`, `object`, `imageset`, `texttrack`, `websocket`, `csp_report`, and `stylesheet`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-44"><a id="__codelineno-0-44" name="__codelineno-0-44"></a><span class="sd">    :param blocked_domains: A set of domain names to block requests to. Subdomains are also matched (e.g., ``"example.com"`` blocks ``"sub.example.com"`` too).</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-45"><a id="__codelineno-0-45" name="__codelineno-0-45"></a><span class="sd">    :param useragent: Pass a useragent string to be used. Otherwise the fetcher will generate a real Useragent of the same browser and use it.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-46"><a id="__codelineno-0-46" name="__codelineno-0-46"></a><span class="sd">    :param cookies: Set cookies for the next request.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-47"><a id="__codelineno-0-47" name="__codelineno-0-47"></a><span class="sd">    :param network_idle: Wait for the page until there are no network connections for at least 500 ms.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-48"><a id="__codelineno-0-48" name="__codelineno-0-48"></a><span class="sd">    :param timeout: The timeout in milliseconds that is used in all operations and waits through the page. The default is 30,000</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-49"><a id="__codelineno-0-49" name="__codelineno-0-49"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait: The time (milliseconds) the fetcher will wait after everything finishes before closing the page and returning the ` Response ` object.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-50"><a id="__codelineno-0-50" name="__codelineno-0-50"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_action: Added for automation. A function that takes the `page` object, runs after navigation, and does the automation you need.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-51"><a id="__codelineno-0-51" name="__codelineno-0-51"></a><span class="sd">    :param page_setup: A function that takes the `page` object, runs before navigation. Use it to register event listeners or routes that must be set up before the page loads.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-52"><a id="__codelineno-0-52" name="__codelineno-0-52"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector: Wait for a specific CSS selector to be in a specific state.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-53"><a id="__codelineno-0-53" name="__codelineno-0-53"></a><span class="sd">    :param init_script: An absolute path to a JavaScript file to be executed on page creation for all pages in this session.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-54"><a id="__codelineno-0-54" name="__codelineno-0-54"></a><span class="sd">    :param locale: Specify user locale, for example, `en-GB`, `de-DE`, etc. Locale will affect navigator.language value, Accept-Language request header value as well as number and date formatting</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-55"><a id="__codelineno-0-55" name="__codelineno-0-55"></a><span class="sd">        rules. Defaults to the system default locale.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-56"><a id="__codelineno-0-56" name="__codelineno-0-56"></a><span class="sd">    :param timezone_id: Changes the timezone of the browser. Defaults to the system timezone.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-57"><a id="__codelineno-0-57" name="__codelineno-0-57"></a><span class="sd">    :param wait_selector_state: The state to wait for the selector given with `wait_selector`. The default state is `attached`.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-58"><a id="__codelineno-0-58" name="__codelineno-0-58"></a><span class="sd">    :param real_chrome: If you have a Chrome browser installed on your device, enable this, and the Fetcher will launch an instance of your browser and use it.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-59"><a id="__codelineno-0-59" name="__codelineno-0-59"></a><span class="sd">    :param load_dom: Enabled by default, wait for all JavaScript on page(s) to fully load and execute.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-60"><a id="__codelineno-0-60" name="__codelineno-0-60"></a><span class="sd">    :param cdp_url: Instead of launching a new browser instance, connect to this CDP URL to control real browsers through CDP.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-61"><a id="__codelineno-0-61" name="__codelineno-0-61"></a><span class="sd">    :param google_search: Enabled by default, Scrapling will set a Google referer header.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-62"><a id="__codelineno-0-62" name="__codelineno-0-62"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_headers: A dictionary of extra headers to add to the request. _The referer set by `google_search` takes priority over the referer set here if used together._</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-63"><a id="__codelineno-0-63" name="__codelineno-0-63"></a><span class="sd">    :param proxy: The proxy to be used with requests, it can be a string or a dictionary with the keys 'server', 'username', and 'password' only.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-64"><a id="__codelineno-0-64" name="__codelineno-0-64"></a><span class="sd">    :param user_data_dir: Path to a User Data Directory, which stores browser session data like cookies and local storage. The default is to create a temporary directory.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-65"><a id="__codelineno-0-65" name="__codelineno-0-65"></a><span class="sd">    :param extra_flags: A list of additional browser flags to pass to the browser on launch.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-66"><a id="__codelineno-0-66" name="__codelineno-0-66"></a><span class="sd">    :param selector_config: The arguments that will be passed in the end while creating the final Selector's class.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-67"><a id="__codelineno-0-67" name="__codelineno-0-67"></a><span class="sd">    :param additional_args: Additional arguments to be passed to Playwright's context as additional settings, and it takes higher priority than Scrapling's settings.</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-68"><a id="__codelineno-0-68" name="__codelineno-0-68"></a><span class="sd">    """</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-69"><a id="__codelineno-0-69" name="__codelineno-0-69"></a>    <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">__validate__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">**</span><span class="n">kwargs</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span><span id="__span-0-70"><a id="__codelineno-0-70" name="__codelineno-0-70"></a>    <span class="nb">super</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="fm">__init__</span><span class="p">()</span>
